ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no other enrichment

ingredients_text: Beetroot Sauce (60%) (Water, Onion, Beetroot (13%), Sunflower Seeds, Sunflower Oil, Mixed Melon Seeds, Garlic, Ginger, Sea Salt, Natural Unrefined Cane Sugar, Dried Fenugreek Leaves, Dried Mixed Spices, Ground Green Cardamom), Vegetable Kofta (40%) (Potato (54%), Mixed Vegetables (18%) (Carrots, Peas, Green Beans, Sweetcorn, Broad Beans), Split Tyson Chickpea Flour (7%), Cornflour, Coriander, Sea Salt, Chaat Masala (Salt, Dehydrated Unripe Mango, Black Salt, Cumin, Coriander, Musk Melon, Black Pepper, Mint Leaves, Dried Ginger, Yellow Chilli, Carom Seed, Cloves, Nutmeg, Asafoetida, Caraway), Ground Fennel, Chilli Powder, Dried Mixed Spices, Ground Turmeric).
